msContents.summary: [p]Semita recta. Preceded by an incomplete and unidentified al-chemical work. Written in a large gothic script, 14 lines to a page: capitals, Incipits, and paragraph marks in red.[/p] [p]Fol. 1 (red) Incipit alberti [?] archanorum [?] archanum. /Cum sit nobilis quedam medicina elixir a phy/losophis nuncupata... line 9 (Text begins) Cum vniuersa uolumina phylosophie/tanquam uagabundus aberrans/perlustrassem... 17v de die in diem contricio pulueris/ [/p] [p]Fol. 18 (red) Incipit recta semita alkymie alberti./Omnis sapientia. est. que. a. D.O./M.I.N.O. DEO est et cum/illo fuit semper ... 19 (Text begins) Cum ergo multas regiones/et plurimas prouincias... 69v ... tunc scias quod uersum est in solem/uel lunam. (red) Explicit.[/p] [p]Written by another hand inside the upper cover 'Anno 1492'.[/p]

msItem.author: Saint Albertus Magnus, d. 1280
msItem.title: Saint Albertus Magnus (d. 1280)
msItem.filiation: Owing to the rubbing of the text, the precise title of the first work is not legible, and the 'Incipit' is not given in Thorndike's 'Catalogue'. It describes the processes for making the 'Elixir' and has many quotations from the 'Turba', Geber, Morigenes [Morienus?] and other Arabic alchemists.

objectDesc.supportDesc:
1 volume69 ll. 8vo. 16 x 12 cm. On vellum: original stamped leather binding over wooden boards, spine damaged. Leather portion of a brass and leather clasp wanting. Leaves wanting after ff. 17, 51, 57, 65, 67: first leaf slightly rubbed, with loss of part of the Incipit.
Fragile

binding.p: 69 ll. 8vo. 16 x 12 cm. On vellum: original stamped leather binding over wooden boards, spine damaged. Leather portion of a brass and leather clasp wanting. Leaves wanting after ff. 17, 51, 57, 65, 67: first leaf slightly rubbed, with loss of part of the Incipit.

history.acquisition: [p]Purchased by Sir Henry Wellcome at the Phillipps sale ([i]Further portion of the classical, historical, topographical, genealogical and other manuscripts & autograph letters of the late Sir Thomas Phillipps ... including upwards of two hundred volumes on vellum dating from the tenth century ... pt. 14[/i]), at Sotheby, Wilkinson and Hodge, 6 June 1910, Lot 10.[/p]

bibl.title: Catalogue of Western Manuscripts on Medicine and Science in the Wellcome Historical Medical Library
bibl.author: S. A. J. Moorat
bibl.publisher: Wellcome Institute for the History of Medicine

availability.p: Please consult the digitised version as this item needs to be accessed in our conservation studio. Email library@wellcomecollection.org to request an appointment.

custodialHist.custEvent: [p]Database description transcribed from S.A.J. Moorat, [i]Catalogue of Western Manuscripts on Medicine and Science in the Wellcome Historical Medical Library[/i] (London: Wellcome Institute for the History of Medicine, 1962-1973), p. 9.[/p]

listBibl.bibl: For alchemical works ascribed to Albertus Magnus, including the 'Semita recta', cf. Thorndike [i]History of Magic and Experimental Science[/i], Vol. II, pp. 569-573; Vol. III, p.42.

revisionDesc.change: Transformed Calm xml export to TEI xml file using a transformation scenario
Manual edits following automated Calm-TEI transformation
